text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Hey, Teach. Hope you had... a good rest... Yawn...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, about that... I got a letter from a former
dorm resident.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
It was pretty long, and I went a little overboard
while writing a reply.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: I ended up writing twice as much as she had, and by the time I was done, the sun was already up. Yawn...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hishi Amazon apparently didn't get much rest
because of how long it took to write her reply...
